name: anselmo-marketplace
description: Marketplace SaaS para arquitetura, terrenos, simulacoes e checkout com split.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @anselmo/api && npm run build -w @anselmo/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @anselmo/api && npm run lint -w @anselmo/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @anselmo/api && npm run typecheck -w @anselmo/web
